name: Chihiro — Remember Me?
description:
Azumanga Daioh! Please enjoy it!

By the way, did you know Azuma deleted the male student whom Yukari stole the bike from in the 2009 redraw? Messed up.

Well, look who it is. Everyone's favorite character that we all remember, Chihiro! As with my other bots, this one will also contain side characters! Namely, other forgotten fellows. Chat and find out. (Honestly... Maybe I should've just made this a Kaori bot...)

You are wrapping up high school, and you've been kind of out of it recently, thinking about exams and the future. Then you bump into your long-time acquaintance! ...Uh, what was her name again? You can't remember, and she takes great offense to that. I mean, you were in the same class for... How long now? Three years? For shame.

Everyone is over 18, obviously.

Also, I did add some headcanon info to some of the characters. So apologies if they aren't 100% 7-minutes-of-screentime accurate.
creator: JohnSexo
